common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

cmdk.label: Global search
cmdk.shortcut_hint: ↑↓ select · Enter open · Esc close · `>` for commands
cmdk.command_shortcut_hint: ↑↓ select · Enter run · Esc close · backspace clears `>` to search

logout.label: Logout
logout.desc: Clear session and go to login

task_result.title: Processing Results
task_result.no_new_points: Processed — no new knowledge points extracted
task_result.all_existing: All knowledge points already exist in the knowledge base

task_detail.error_kind_content_length: Content length not allowed (too short or too long)
task_detail.error_kind_not_found: Source not found (it may not exist or be private)

log.title: Execution Log
log.clear_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to clear all execution logs for this task? This action cannot be undone.

done.entity_no_facts: No new facts in this run.
done.entity_no_opinions: No new opinions in this run.
done.discard_explainer: This source shouldn't be in the library? Discard clears its KPs and marks the source as discarded.
done.drawer_subtitle: All knowledge points accepted by this task
done.confirm_discard_msg: This will clear the {count} KPs accepted by this task and mark the source as discarded.

error.card_hint_retry: Retry — most transient errors clear on the second try;
error.card_hint_text: If it keeps failing, try resubmitting plain-text excerpts;
error.card_hint_content_policy: The content tripped a content-policy limit — retrying won't change the outcome; use a different source or content;
error.card_hint_content_length: Content length is out of the allowed range (too long or too short) — trim or expand it accordingly, or adjust the limits under Settings · Engine / Collect · Content length, then retry;
error.card_hint_nonretryable: Retrying won't resolve this error — review the source or content and resubmit;
error.confirm_delete_msg: The task will be removed immediately along with any intermediate state.

processing.flavor_5: Writing little cards for new findings…
processing.confirm_cancel_msg: The task will be terminated immediately along with any collected/classified intermediates.

auth.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute.

actions.input_too_short: Text input must be at least 4 characters.
actions.input_too_long: Text input must be at most {limit} characters.
actions.query_too_long: Knowledge questions must be at most {limit} characters.
actions.input_too_long_for_intent: Input is too long for this type of request.
actions.url_blocked: This URL is not allowed for security reasons. If your network resolves public domains into reserved IP ranges (typical with proxy fake-IP modes such as Clash / Surge), disable the SSRF check in Settings → Account & Security.
actions.url_duplicate: This URL has already been submitted.
actions.submit_rate_limited: Too many submissions. Please wait a minute and try again.
actions.submit_failed: Submission failed. Please try again later.
actions.retry_not_failed: Only failed tasks can be retried.
actions.retry_not_retryable: This task's failure can't be fixed by retrying — review the source or content and resubmit.
actions.retry_source_not_found: Source not found for this task.
actions.retry_source_conflict: Another source with this URL is already being processed.
actions.retry_failed: Retry failed. Please try again later.
actions.discard_wrong_status: Only confirmed or confirmed_empty sources can be discarded.
actions.discard_failed: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
actions.delete_task_is_done: Please use discard for done tasks.
actions.delete_task_is_processing: Cannot delete a task that is currently being processed.
actions.delete_task_failed: Failed to delete task. Please try again later.
actions.clear_logs_failed: Failed to clear logs. Please try again later.
actions.multiple_urls: Input contains multiple URLs ({count} total), only the first one will be processed.
actions.intent_failed: Could not understand your input. Please try again.
actions.query_failed: Knowledge query failed. Please try again later.
actions.unknown_intent: Could not process your input. Please try again.
actions.plugin_error: An error occurred while processing your input.
actions.tracking_pending_pipeline: Waiting for the source analysis to finish before setting up tracking.
actions.tracking_pending_multi_entity: Please pick which subject to track.

polling.session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
polling.server_error: Server error. Please refresh the page.
polling.server_unreachable: Unable to reach server. Please refresh the page.
polling.poll_timeout: Polling timed out. Please refresh the page.

privacy.notice: Submitted content will be processed by external LLM APIs. Do not submit sensitive, confidential, or personal information.

toast.error: Refresh failed. Please try again later.

task_list.no_tasks: No tasks yet. Submit a URL above to get started.
task_list.refresh_paused: Auto-refresh paused. Please refresh the page.
task_list.session_expired: Session expired. Please refresh and log in again.

chat.input_placeholder: Paste a link, ask a question, or jot down a thought…
chat.clarify_hint: Please reply with more details to continue.
chat.intent_error: Could not process your input. Please try again.
chat.render_error: Something went wrong displaying the messages.
chat.welcome_prompt: Goldpan helps you submit links, query knowledge, track topics, and capture thoughts.
chat.unarchive_error: Could not resume this conversation. Try again later.
chat.new_conversation_error: Could not start a new conversation. Try again later.
chat.switched_conversation: Switched to this past conversation. The previous active one has been archived.
chat.conversation_deleted: That conversation is no longer available.
chat.reclassify_fallback_session: Original conversation was archived, switched to a new conversation
chat.reclassify_rollback_failed: Reclassification failed and the rollback unarchive also failed ({error}). The original note is archived; check the archived list to recover.
chat.buffered_cross_channel: This message belongs to a different channel.
chat.clarify_parse_error: Could not read the clarification options. Please reload.

duplicate_bubble.body: This content was already processed — no new task was created.

tasks.list_empty_title: No tasks yet — submit a URL on the home page to get started.
tasks.list_refresh_failed: Could not refresh the list. What you see may be out of date.
tasks.list_delete_confirm: Delete this task? This cannot be undone.

conversations.delete_confirm: Delete this conversation and all of its messages? This cannot be undone.
conversations.empty_description: Ending a conversation archives it here for later.

digest.title: Daily digest
digest.disabled: Digest plugin is disabled. Set GOLDPAN_DIGEST_ENABLED=true in your .env and restart the server to enable it.
digest.share_expired_description: This share link has expired or is invalid. Please retrieve a fresh link from your IM.
digest.share_item_hint: Open in main app for details
digest.toolbar_subtitle_daily_calendar: Sources, thoughts, entities and tracking hits added yesterday (00:00–23:59 local).
digest.toolbar_subtitle_daily_rolling: Sources, thoughts, entities and tracking hits added in the last 24 hours.
digest.toolbar_subtitle_weekly_calendar: Sources, thoughts, entities and tracking hits from the last 7 calendar days (aligned to local midnight).
digest.toolbar_subtitle_weekly_rolling: Sources, thoughts, entities and tracking hits added in the last 7 days.
digest.ai_hero_failed_body: AI summary generation failed for this snapshot — the model key is missing or the upstream timed out. Other content is unaffected.
digest.disabled_title: Five minutes a day to read what the system curated for you yesterday.
digest.disabled_lede_before: The digest auto-aggregates new sources, thoughts, entities and tracking hits from the last 24 hours into a readable brief. The
digest.disabled_lede_after: plugin is currently disabled — once enabled this page is replaced with the live preview.
digest.disabled_value_1_d: Yesterday's new sources, thoughts and entities are auto-compiled into a reading experience — no manual library digging.
digest.disabled_value_2_d: Hits for topics / keywords you watch are split into their own block, with inline citations linked to the inspector.
digest.disabled_value_3_d: Generate a read-only public link to send to teammates or external readers; preset toggles control disclosure.
digest.disabled_enable_desc: Flip the “Enable digest” toggle in Settings — you'll get a restart prompt and the server reloads automatically; this page refreshes to the digest reading view when it's back.
digest.disabled_status_idle_s: Click the button to re-probe the plugin status
digest.disabled_status_fail_t: Still not enabled — confirm the settings were saved and the server restarted
digest.share_dialog_description: Read-only public link · expires in {days} days.
digest.share_dialog_unavailable_body: Set GOLDPAN_DIGEST_LINK_SIGNING_KEY (≥32 chars) and GOLDPAN_DIGEST_PUBLIC_BASE_URL in your .env, restart the server, then try again.

debug.title: Debug Logs
debug.subtitle: Execution logs and LLM call details for each pipeline task.
debug.search_placeholder: Search by task ID / source URL / title…
debug.empty_hint: When a chat or tracking rule creates a source, the processing pipeline records its run here. You can also POST /submit directly to trigger a test task.
debug.empty_filtered_hint: Try adjusting the status / source / range filters or clearing the search box.
debug.no_stages: No stages to show. Adjust the stage / type filters.
debug.no_events_in_stage: No matching events in this stage.
debug.collapsed_kp: Bulk store · created {kp} points + {ent} entities + {other} other
debug.action_retry_only_failed: Retry is only available for failed tasks

source_view_payload.empty_title: No knowledge points extracted from this source
source_view_payload.empty_description: The content may be too short or not contain meaningful information

interest_payload.linked_entities_hint: Auto-linked via Library's "Track this topic" button (V1: cannot edit here)
interest_payload.executions_empty_never_ran: Not executed yet (first run on next scheduler cycle)
interest_payload.executions_empty_disabled: Disabled — no new executions will be produced

library.source_discard_confirm: Discard this source? It won't be deleted, but will no longer be matched or displayed.
library.section_load_failed_entities: Failed to load entities. Please retry.
library.section_load_failed_notes: Failed to load notes. Please retry.
library.section_load_failed_archived_notes: Failed to load archived notes. Please retry.
library.section_load_failed_sources: Failed to load sources. Please retry.
library.source_discard_failed: Discard failed, please try again later.
library.entities_empty_hint: Paste an article or note in the chat — Goldpan will extract entities here.
library.empty_suggest_lede: Want to try? Pick a starting point:
library.empty_suggest_card_url_hint: Paste a URL — Goldpan fetches and extracts knowledge.
library.empty_suggest_card_note_hint: Jot down a thought; it lands as an opinion note.
library.empty_suggest_card_query_hint: Search what you've already collected in plain language.
library.entities_empty_filtered_title: No entities under this category / search
library.entities_empty_filtered_hint: Try a parent category or clear the search.
library.sources_empty_hint: Sources appear here once their pipeline run finishes.
library.sources_empty_filtered_hint: Try a parent category or clear the category filter.
library.toast_source_discarded: Source discarded · linked KPs cleaned up
library.notes_empty_hint: Type a thought or snippet in the chat — Goldpan saves it as a note (or memo when there's a reminder) and auto-links to sources / entities / knowledge graph (the key difference vs traditional note apps).
library.notes_empty_filtered_hint: Try switching to another subtype, or clear the filter.
library.notes_empty_archived_hint: Notes you archive from the note detail view will appear here.
library.confirmed_empty_partial_failure: Some secondary data failed to load

tracking.empty_description: Click "Track this topic" in an entity's detail, or "New interest" above
tracking.confirm_delete: Delete this interest? Related sources will be kept, only the association is removed.
tracking.form_queries_hint: Separate with Enter or comma; at least one
tracking.form_error_queries_required: At least one search query is required
tracking.form_error_query_too_long: Each search query must be ≤ 100 characters: {query}
tracking.form_error_queries_joined_too_long: Joined search queries (connected with ' OR ') are {length} chars, exceeding the 500-char cap
tracking.create_refetch_failed: Created successfully, but the list failed to refresh. Please reload the page to see the latest data.
tracking.page_subtitle: Put a radar on the topics you care about — Goldpan polls the web on a schedule, dedupes, and pipes new hits into your library.
tracking.hero_title: Put a radar on the topics you care about
tracking.hero_hint: Configure one rule. Goldpan sweeps your search engines on the cadence you choose, dedupes hits, and pipes new links straight into the library.
tracking.hero_step_1_desc: Multi-keyword OR matching; from hourly through weekly.
tracking.hero_step_2_desc: Pulls fresh links via Tavily / Serper / Google.
tracking.hero_step_3_desc: Known sources are skipped; new content is fed to the Library pipeline.
tracking.search_tool_warn_body: Tracking needs at least one search plugin (Tavily / Serper / Google) to pull results. Enable one under Settings → Search Tools and add your API key.
tracking.hero_needs_search_hint: Tracking pulls links via a search engine. Open settings, enable at least one (Tavily / Serper / Google / Brave / Exa / SearXNG), fill in the API key or URL, then come back to create your first interest.

shell.title: Settings
shell.mock_banner: Demo data only — changes are not persisted.
shell.saved_restart_toast: Saved as runtime override · effective on next call (some keys still need a restart)
shell.saved_shadowed_toast: Saved as runtime override, but the runtime value is shadowed by an external env (docker / k8s / supervisor); remove that injection and restart for the change to take effect
shell.err_content_length_min_gt_max: Min content length can't exceed max content length — adjust and save again.
shell.err_content_length_text_gt_max: Max pasted-text length can't exceed max content length — adjust and save again.
shell.leave_group_modal_heading: Discard unsaved changes in this group?
shell.leave_group_modal_desc: Switching to another group will lose your edits.

restart.auto_restart_body: Click below to gracefully restart the running server. We'll wait for it to come back and reload the page automatically; if it takes too long, refresh the page manually.
restart.auto_restart_unknown_hint: Supervisor not recognized — if the page doesn't recover after a restart, check the process manually.
restart.auto_restart_split_web_hint: Heads up: if your web container is separate (docker / k8s), restart it too — its auth/language env are read at process start.
restart.auto_restart_in_progress: Restarting — we'll reload this page once the server is ready (or refresh manually)…
restart.auto_restart_timeout: Restart timed out — check the supervisor status, then reload manually.
restart.auto_restart_post_failed: Server rejected the restart request. Check server logs and try again.
restart.manual_restart_body: The current process can't be restarted from the web (concurrently shuts down server and web together). Please:
restart.manual_restart_step_terminal: Press Ctrl+C in your terminal to stop the current process
restart.manual_restart_one_click_hint: Want one-click web restart? Start with pnpm dev / pnpm start:supervised / docker — they bring their own supervisor and you'll see a restart button here instead.

account.heading: Account & security
account.desc: Login password for this instance. For production deployments, set it via .env / docker secrets at startup; passwords saved here are stored as a runtime override in the local DB.
account.field_password_hint: Takes effect after restarting both server and web — each process reads the password at its own startup.
account.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
account.card_ssrf_sub: Submitted / tracked / collected URLs are SSRF-validated before fetch, blocking private subnets, reserved ranges, and cloud metadata endpoints.
account.ssrf_on_info_heading: URLs blocked while using a proxy? You may need to disable this
account.ssrf_on_info_body: Local transparent proxies (Clash / V2Ray / Surge) can map public DNS into reserved ranges, causing legitimate URLs to be blocked by this check. Disabling the toggle bypasses it — safe for single-user local setups.
account.ssrf_on_info_why_body: Fake-ip mode in transparent proxies resolves public hostnames into reserved ranges like 198.18.0.0/15 or 100.64.0.0/10 to intercept traffic. SSRF validation treats those addresses as internal and refuses them. Prefer switching the proxy to redir-host / direct DNS; disable this check only when you can't change the proxy.
account.ssrf_off_warn_heading: Disabled — do not use this on public deployments
account.ssrf_off_warn_body: Any URL — including localhost, internal subnets, and cloud metadata (169.254.169.254) — will be fetched directly. Only safe for single-user local setups.
account.reset_modal_body_clear: Resetting clears the current password. The account enters an «unconfigured» state.
account.reset_modal_body_clear_with_baseline: Resetting clears the UI-configured password. After the restart, the server falls back to the password from your .env baseline.
account.reset_modal_body_baseline_hint: Login stays protected by the .env baseline password; no need to restore GOLDPAN_AUTH_PASSWORD manually.
account.reset_modal_body_restart: Confirming will restart the server automatically. Expect a short 5–15s downtime.
account.reset_modal_body_security_warn: ⚠ Once restarted, anyone can reach this instance. Make sure the server is not exposed to the public internet, or restore the GOLDPAN_AUTH_PASSWORD environment variable before it comes back up.
account.reset_modal_status_restarting: Password cleared. Restarting the server — it's briefly unavailable. Please wait…
account.reset_error_network: Reset failed: network error. Check that the server is reachable and try again.
account.reset_error_unknown: Reset failed. Try again in a moment, or check the server logs.
account.restart_error_timeout: Password cleared, but the server didn't come back within 60 seconds. Refresh the page manually to confirm, or check supervisor / docker logs.
account.restart_error_unknown: Password cleared, but the restart failed. Restart the server manually and refresh the page.
account.restart_error_with_detail: Password cleared, but the restart failed: {message}

appearance.heading: Appearance & language
appearance.desc: Client-side preferences. Changes apply immediately; no server restart needed.
appearance.language_changed: Saved as runtime override · restart server and web to apply (the web process reads its own process.env at startup)
appearance.field_translate_pipeline_hint: When on, the pipeline translates extracted facts, opinions, entity descriptions, relation descriptions, and summaries into the interface language. Originals are kept and can be toggled on each card. Applies to runs after this change; existing items are not back-translated.
appearance.field_timezone_hint: Affects digest schedule + timestamp display. Set during onboarding; edit GOLDPAN_TIMEZONE env var to change.

data.heading: Data & backup
data.desc: Everything is stored locally in SQLite. Backup is just a DB file export — nothing is uploaded to any external service.
data.field_export_all_hint: Single .tar.gz · includes raw captures and inspector output
data.field_clear_log_hint: Keeps entities and captures; deletes only pipeline logs
data.field_reset_hint: Drops the DB and restarts. Irrecoverable — back up first.
data.modal_reset_desc: All content (entities / captures / logs / config) will be deleted.
data.reset_command_toast: Run on the server: goldpan reset --confirm
data.reset_notice: This action cannot be completed in the UI — a backup runs first, then copy the server-side command:

digest.heading: Digest
digest.desc: Manage digest presets per channel. Each channel may have multiple presets, but only one default.
digest.field_digest_enabled_hint: When off, scheduled generation stops; your presets are kept
digest.prereq_missing_heading: Cannot enable: digest's LLM steps have no usable provider yet
digest.prereq_missing_body: The digest relies on these LLM steps — set them up under LLM · Model assignment first:
digest.channel_unconfigured_toast: {channelName} is not configured · go to Notifications / IM first
digest.channel_web_sub: Switch presets from the digest header · scheduled pushes only use the preset tagged Auto-push
digest.channel_im_sub: Mock data · Phase 4 lands real pushes
digest.new_preset_card_sub: Start blank, or clone an existing one
digest.log_today_telegram_hint: Same as above · pushed to chat -100…2419
digest.modal_delete_desc: Already-generated digests are unaffected (only the preset config is removed).
digest.drawer_form_push_time_hint: Default for new IM subscriptions · existing subscriptions are not auto-updated
digest.drawer_form_period_hint_calendar_daily: Covers 1 local calendar day (yesterday 00:00–23:59, local tz)
digest.drawer_form_period_hint_calendar_weekly: Covers the past 7 local calendar days (including yesterday)
digest.drawer_form_period_hint_rolling_daily: Covers a 24h rolling window ending at the snapshot's generation time
digest.drawer_form_period_hint_rolling_weekly: Covers a 7-day rolling window (7 × 24h) ending at the snapshot's generation time
digest.drawer_form_window_mode_hint: Calendar: aligned to local midnight, fixed daily slice · Rolling: 24h/7d ending at generation time
digest.drawer_form_modules_hint: Click to toggle · drag enabled rows to reorder · the number is the order in the digest
digest.drawer_form_skip_empty_hint: Hide the section entirely when its body has no content
digest.drawer_form_include_ai_hint: Falls back automatically when the digest LLM is not configured
digest.drawer_form_preview: Preview (based on the last 24h of data)
digest.drawer_preview_empty: No modules selected · preview is empty
digest.preview_thoughts: "The hardest part of a PRD isn't writing — it's cutting"
digest.preview_ai_summary: Today centred on AI engineering practice across 3 themes…

llm.heading: Model providers
llm.desc: Models used by each pipeline step plus the API keys for connecting to LLMs. Saved changes take effect immediately (API keys / model assignments use DB overrides with hot reload).
llm.matrix_section_pipeline_desc: Seven LLM-driven steps in the ingestion pipeline (classify → extract → match → relate → compare → verify → translate).
llm.matrix_section_query_desc: Intent classification on user input, plus the model that synthesizes knowledge answers.
llm.matrix_section_digest_desc: Daily / weekly digest summary and the IM action parser used by digest channels.
llm.timeout_global_hint: Default for every LLM step (classify, extract, query, …). Per-step overrides below fall back to this when empty.
llm.timeout_advanced_hint: Each step inherits the global timeout ({default}s) unless set here. Leave a row empty to inherit; use the reset button to remove a saved override.
llm.ollama_row_hint: Local Ollama daemon. No API key required — once enabled, ollama appears in the Pipeline provider dropdown.
llm.provider_models_hint: Type a model id and press Enter (or comma) to add; click × to remove. The Pipeline matrix dropdown reads from this list; leave blank to fall back to the freeform input. The example values shown in the placeholder are starters — copy or replace as needed.

matrix.feature_disabled_hint_restart: Enable in {settingsPath}, then restart the server
matrix.unconfigured_provider_hint: Add the API key in the Providers & keys tab first
matrix.provider_changed_warn: Enter a model id for the new provider
matrix.model_no_models_configured: Add models in Provider settings first
matrix.reset_title: Delete the override and revert to the .env / default value
matrix.timeout_invalid: Integer between {min} and {max} seconds, or leave empty to inherit global
matrix.timeout_pill_title: This step has a custom timeout of {value}s — edit in the LLM call timeout panel below.

reasoning.label: Thinking depth
reasoning.custom_hint: {envKey} value is not on the tier ladder — edit .env or reset to use tier presets

classifier.label: classifier · Intent classification
classifier.hint: Pipeline step 2: classify input as URL / text / command

extractor.label: extractor · Entity extraction
extractor.hint: Pipeline step 3: extract facts / entities from content

matcher.label: matcher · Entity matching
matcher.hint: Pipeline step 4: match extracted entities to existing ones

relator.label: relator · Relation reasoning
relator.hint: Pipeline step 5: infer relations between matched entities (off by default)

comparator.label: comparator · Content comparison
comparator.hint: Pipeline step 6: compare new facts against the store, flag conflicts

verifier.label: verifier · Fact verification
verifier.hint: Pipeline step 7: cross-check facts with the source, drop hallucinations (off by default)

translator.label: translator · Content translation
translator.hint: Pipeline step 7.5: translate extracted facts / opinions / descriptions / summaries into the configured language (off by default)

intent.label: intent · User intent
intent.hint: Frontend entry: classify user input as submit / Q&A / opinion

digest_summary.label: digest_summary · Digest summary
digest_summary.hint: Digest scheduler: summarize daily / weekly content

digest_action.label: digest_action · IM command parser
digest_action.hint: Digest IM channel: parse subscribe / list / pause / set-push-time commands from user input

llm.no_configured_providers: No providers configured yet — pick one to add below.
llm.add_card_desc: Pick an official provider to add directly. If yours isn't listed, use the OpenAI-compatible path or write a plugin.
llm.add_builtin_modal_desc: Provide the API key — it takes effect immediately.
llm.add_builtin_modal_desc_ollama: Local Ollama daemon. No API key required — once enabled, ollama appears in the Pipeline provider dropdown.
llm.delete_builtin_modal_desc: Delete {id}? This clears the API key and model list set in the UI. If you also have the same variable in your .env file, the .env value resurfaces immediately — edit the .env file directly and restart the server to fully remove it.
llm.delete_builtin_modal_desc_from_baseline: {id} is currently supplied by your .env file ({key}). Deleting from the UI can't remove it from the boot baseline: the moment the override is cleared, {key} resurfaces from .env and {id} stays in the list. To fully remove it, edit your .env file and restart the server. Confirming here only clears any UI-set model list override.
llm.delete_save_shadowed_toast: UI override cleared, but {key} is still defined in your .env file — {id} will not disappear. Edit .env and restart the server to fully remove it.
llm.provider_hint_openai: chat: gpt-4o / gpt-4o-mini; embedding: text-embedding-3-small / text-embedding-3-large (toggle the embedding switch on the right after adding).
llm.provider_hint_google: chat: gemini-2.0-flash / gemini-1.5-pro; embedding: text-embedding-004 (toggle the embedding switch after adding).
llm.provider_hint_openrouter: chat: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4 / openai/gpt-4o-mini (OpenRouter doesn't expose embeddings — use the source provider directly for vector search).
llm.provider_hint_ollama: chat: llama3.2 / qwen2.5; embedding: nomic-embed-text / mxbai-embed-large (run `ollama pull` first).
llm.provider_hint_custom: chat / embedding depends on what your OpenAI-compatible service supports. Add the model id and toggle the embedding switch on the right to mark its role.
llm.add_openai_modal_desc: Most modern providers (Together, Mistral, Groq, Fireworks, etc.) speak the OpenAI Chat Completions protocol. Just give it an id, a base URL, and an API key.
llm.add_field_id_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, or underscore. Used as the prefix in model strings (e.g., `together:llama-3.3-70b`).
llm.add_field_id_invalid: Must start with a letter; lowercase letters / digits / underscore only.
llm.add_field_id_duplicate: Provider id already exists. Choose a different id.
llm.add_field_base_url_hint: Including `/v1` if the provider expects it (e.g., `https://api.together.xyz/v1`).
llm.add_field_apikey_env_hint: Uppercase env var name where your API key will be stored. Auto-suggested from the provider id.
llm.add_field_apikey_env_invalid: Uppercase letters / digits / underscore only; must start with a letter or underscore.
llm.add_field_models_hint: Type a model id and press Enter to add; the toggle marks the row as an embedding model; click × to remove. Used only to populate the Pipeline matrix dropdown — values are not validated; the SDK will surface errors at call time.
llm.add_save_ok_toast: Saved. The new provider is now available in the Pipeline matrix.
llm.edit_openai_modal_desc: Update baseURL or the API key. The env var name stays derived from provider id. Provider id is read-only — to rename, delete and re-add.
llm.edit_field_apikey_hint: Leave blank to keep the existing key; enter a new value to overwrite. If you change the env variable name above, a new key value is required.
llm.delete_modal_desc_unused: Delete {id}? This clears the runtime overrides for baseURL and env-name mapping ({apiKeyEnv}). The API key in your .env file will not be removed automatically.
llm.delete_modal_desc_referenced: {id} is currently used by these pipeline steps: {steps}. Deleting it will break those steps — switch them to another provider in Pipeline matrix first.
llm.delete_btn_cancel_force: I understand the risk, delete anyway
llm.add_plugin_modal_desc: If your provider doesn't speak OpenAI-compatible protocol, write a small plugin that wraps any LanguageModelV3.
llm.add_plugin_step1_body: If your provider has its own protocol (Cohere, Bedrock, etc.) the OpenAI-compatible path won't work. A plugin lets you implement the LanguageModelV3 contract directly.
llm.add_plugin_step2_body: Create `plugins/llm-{providerSlug}/` with a `package.json` and `src/index.ts`. Reference the `docs/example-plugins/llm-noop/` sample in this repo.
llm.add_plugin_step3_body: Export `goldpanPlugin: LlmProviderPlugin` from `src/index.ts`. Required fields: name, version, type ('llm-provider'), description, providerId, createProvider().
llm.add_plugin_step4_body: Run `pnpm install && pnpm -r build`, then restart the server. Your provider appears in the dropdown automatically.

embedding.heading: Vector search (Embedding)
embedding.desc: Off by default. Enabling activates hybrid search (FTS5 + vector RRF fusion) for significantly better knowledge-query recall, but first start runs a backfill (time scales with stored fact count). Providers are set up under Model providers — add an embedding model (e.g. text-embedding-3-small) to your OpenAI / Ollama / custom provider there and it will appear here.
embedding.card_enable_sub: Toggling requires a server restart (first enable runs backfill scaling with stored fact count).
embedding.field_enabled_hint: When off, hybrid search degrades to FTS5 keyword-only. Toggling requires a server restart.
embedding.first_time_hint: No override persisted yet — current value comes from boot baseline. Saving will create a runtime override, applied on restart.
embedding.card_model_sub: Providers come from Model providers; the model must be added to that provider AND have its embedding switch toggled on — e.g. add text-embedding-3-small to OpenAI / nomic-embed-text to Ollama, then toggle the embedding switch on the right.
embedding.field_model_hint: Format `provider:model`. Requires a server restart to take effect.
embedding.model_no_models_configured: Provider has no embedding models — go to Model providers, add a model id, and toggle the embedding switch (e.g. text-embedding-3-small).
embedding.field_dimensions_hint: 0 = auto-detect at start from the model. A non-zero value must match the model's actual output dimensions or startup will fail.
embedding.field_batch_size_hint: Max facts / points per embedMany call, 1–1000.

notify.heading: Notifications / IM
notify.desc: Once configured, these can serve as digest push targets and tracking-job completion notifications.

plugins.heading: Plugins
plugins.desc: Plugins discovered by the server at startup.
plugins.header_notice: Plugins are scanned on server startup. IM channels (Telegram / Feishu) are managed separately in <imLink>Notify</imLink>.
plugins.placeholder_banner: Registry install is not yet implemented.
plugins.manual_install_steps: See README plugin section for details.
plugins.footer_troubleshoot: Don't see a plugin you just installed? Check common causes →

collect.heading: Collect
collect.desc: Configure how Goldpan fetches content from URLs.
collect.field_collect_timeout_hint: Default per-collector timeout. Plugin-specific overrides may apply (e.g. media collector defaults to 90s).
collect.field_max_content_hint: Max characters a single source may have to enter the pipeline; anything longer fails with a content_length error. Must be ≥ the two limits below. Default 30000, takes effect immediately.
collect.field_min_content_hint: Content shorter than this is rejected as too short. Default 50, takes effect immediately.
collect.field_max_text_input_hint: Max length of text pasted/submitted directly in chat; must be ≤ max content length. Default 20000, takes effect immediately.
collect.field_browser_strategy_hint: auto = system Chrome first then bundled; bundled = always Playwright Chromium; system-chrome = require system install.
collect.field_browser_executable_hint: Optional. Custom Chrome / Chromium binary path. Leave empty for default resolution.
collect.field_media_timeout_hint: Video collector (yt-dlp) overall timeout. Independent from global collect timeout.
collect.field_yt_dlp_auto_update_hint: Check GitHub for the latest yt-dlp release on startup. Disable for offline / pinned environments.
collect.field_yt_dlp_binary_hint: Optional. Use an external yt-dlp binary instead of the auto-managed one.
collect.field_yt_dlp_cookies_hint: Optional. Path to a cookies.txt for sites requiring login (e.g. Bilibili members-only videos).
collect.field_github_token_hint: Optional. Personal access token. Without one, GitHub API limits to 60 requests/hour.

contribution.validation_error_toast: Invalid input — please check the format
contribution.timeout_error_toast: Action timed out — please try again
contribution.internal_error_toast: Internal error — please try again later

search.heading: Search tools
search.desc: Every enabled engine participates in the pipeline's web research; the caller picks the best match per query (general / academic / SERP operators / privacy). No need to set a global order here.
search.card_engines_sub: One engine per row: filling its key or toggling it on adds it to the candidate set; an empty row has no effect on the others.
search.empty_state: No search plugins registered yet — install a search plugin under plugins/ (e.g. tool-search-tavily / tool-search-google) and restart the server to configure it here.
search.hint_exa: Semantic search · long-form & academic friendly · ~$0.005 / query
search.hint_serper: Google SERP proxy · supports site: and other advanced operators · ~$0.001 / query
search.hint_brave: Supports site: operator · privacy-first · free tier (rate limited)
search.hint_searxng: Self-hosted meta-search · multi-source aggregation · no cost
search.hint_google: Playwright SERP scraper · no API key but CAPTCHA / rate-limit risk; off by default
search.usage_label_operators: Write these operators directly in the query string:
search.usage_label_struct: Pass via structured fields (q operators not supported):
search.usage_op_inbody_desc: Body contains the keyword (Brave uses inbody:, Serper uses intext:)
search.usage_op_ext_desc: Restrict by file extension (Brave uses ext:, not filetype:)
search.usage_op_allintitle_desc: Title contains all of the words
search.usage_caveat_brave: Brave operators are still experimental; custom date ranges are not supported (don't write before: / after:).
search.usage_caveat_searxng: Operators are forwarded to whichever engines SearXNG is configured with — actual support depends on the backend. Supports bangs like !g / !ddg / !yt to target a single engine.
search.usage_caveat_tavily: include / exclude domains are capped at 150 each. timeRange still works alongside the date fields; the date fields take precedence.
search.usage_caveat_exa: include / exclude domains are capped at 1200 each and support subdomain wildcards (*.foo.com) plus URL-path filtering. includeDomains is restricted under category=company / people.
search.usage_caveat_serper: On top of Google's operators Serper also supports intext: / allintitle: / allintext: / allinurl: / related: / cache:.
search.usage_caveat_google: Scrapes Google SERP via Playwright; a CAPTCHA puts the browser into a 30-minute cooldown. Hourly limit and per-request delay are controlled by separate env vars.

a11y.field_tag_restart_hint_tail: in the sidebar, then click {button} on that page.

origin.baseline_differs_hint: Baseline (.env / docker / k8s) defines a different value for this key. Override is winning at runtime.

actions.reset_hint: Delete the runtime override and revert to the baseline (.env / default).
actions.reset_success_toast: Override removed; baseline value is now in effect.
actions.export_hint: Download a .env snippet of the current DB-persisted overrides (excludes baseline and defaults).
actions.env_mapping_toggle_hint: Toggle the per-field .env variable name, origin badge and shadowed warning (cosmetic only — behavior unchanged).

restart_prompt.title: Restart server required
restart_prompt.body: Saved. The settings below will load after the server restarts. After you click "Restart now", we'll wait for the server to come back and reload this page automatically; if it takes too long, refresh the page manually.
restart_prompt.dual_process_warn: Heads up: if your web container is separate (docker / k8s), restart it too — these settings are read once at web process startup and cached.
restart_prompt.timeout: Restart may still be in progress: server hasn't responded after 60s. Refresh the page once it returns.
restart_prompt.pending_banner: Saved to database. {count, plural, =1 {1 setting needs a server restart to take effect} other {# settings need a server restart to take effect}}.

first_save.title: Settings now save to the database
first_save.body: Starting with this version, UI changes are persisted to the local database — your .env file is no longer modified by the UI. On every restart, database overrides take precedence over .env.

field_status.pending_restart_shadowed: Saved · restart to take effect · baseline (.env / docker / k8s) still has old value
field_status.error_no_detail: Save failed — see the notice above
field_status.pending_restart_aria: Saved {field}, restart server to take effect
field_status.pending_restart_shadowed_aria: Saved {field}, restart server to take effect; baseline (.env / docker / k8s) still has old value
field_status.error_no_detail_aria: {field} save failed, see the notice above

onboarding.shell_error_hydrate_body: Server unreachable on initial load. The form may be empty even if you've previously typed values. Refresh once the server is back.
onboarding.shell_error_patch_body: Your most recent change couldn't be saved to the wizard server. Re-enter the value or refresh — your input will be lost on the next page navigation otherwise.
onboarding.welcome_desc: Once the {total}-step setup is done, you can start collecting and extracting knowledge.
onboarding.language_section_desc: Applies to the built-in web UI, knowledge extraction, and chat answers
onboarding.language_locked_tooltip: Language is locked in the database. To change, recreate the database.
onboarding.theme_section_desc: Follow system, or pick light / dark manually.
onboarding.web_toggle_description: On by default. Off means API / IM only.
onboarding.web_toggle_off_warning_body: After restart, the web frontend will not start. You can re-enable by editing the host .env to GOLDPAN_WEB_ENABLED=true and restarting, or by running the CLI wizard.
onboarding.pipeline_intro_banner: Add at least one provider under «Add a new provider» (OpenAI or Anthropic is the fastest start), then each step below lets you pick a provider + model. Reusing one provider across all steps is fine.
onboarding.no_configured_providers: No providers configured yet — pick one to add below.
onboarding.add_provider_card_desc: Pick an official provider to add directly. To use an OpenAI-compatible endpoint or a custom plugin, head to Settings → Model providers after onboarding.
onboarding.edit_apikey_hint: Leave blank to keep the current API key
onboarding.model_no_models_configured: Provider has no models — edit it under «Configured providers» to add some.
onboarding.embedding_hint_title: Need vector search? Enable it under Settings → Embedding after the wizard
onboarding.embedding_hint_body: FTS5 keyword search is enough to run the full pipeline by default. For richer semantic matching, finish the wizard and turn on hybrid retrieval (FTS5 + vector RRF fusion) under Settings → Embedding, then pick an embedding model.

classifier.title: Classifier
classifier.description: Routes each content piece into a category path + extracts 1-5 keywords. Lightweight task; cheap models (e.g. GPT-4o-mini) work well.

extractor.title: Extractor
extractor.description: Extracts 3-10 factual statements + associated entities from raw text. Structured task; needs medium-tier model (e.g. Claude Sonnet).

matcher.title: Entity matching
matcher.description: Decides whether a new fact's entity is an alias of an existing entity. Mismatches are costly; same tier as extractor recommended.

comparator.title: Fact comparison
comparator.description: Compares new facts against known facts to decide 'new' vs 'update'. Needs solid semantic understanding.

verifier.title: Fact verifier (optional)
verifier.description: Second-pass check on extracted facts to remove hallucinations. Doubles LLM calls; for precision-critical scenarios.

relator.title: Entity relations (optional)
relator.description: Extra LLM pass to extract entity-entity relations (A is CEO of B, etc). Significantly more cost.

intent.title: Intent classifier
intent.description: Decides user input intent (submit / ask / command). Lightweight; cheap models recommended.

query.title: Knowledge query
query.description: Answers user questions based on stored facts. The user-facing step; capable model recommended.

providers.embedding_unsupported_notice: This provider doesn't expose an embedding endpoint — chat only. For vector search, use a provider with embedding support such as OpenAI / Google / Ollama.
providers.embedding_examples_hint: Known embedding models for {provider}: {examples} (examples only — refer to the official docs for the latest).

digest.section_desc: Generate a daily summary of recent captures, tracking findings, and new entities at a fixed time. Accept the defaults to finish onboarding — you can revisit «Settings → Digest» anytime to tweak.
digest.module_order_hint: Need a custom module order? After restart, rearrange via the /digest page.

tracking.section_desc: Periodically search the web for new content matching your keywords and auto-ingest. Skip or accept defaults — you can manage rules under «Tracking» and providers under «Settings → Search tools» anytime.
tracking.rules_empty_hint: No tracking rules yet. Click "+ Add rule" to create one.
tracking.search_provider_google: Google + Playwright (no key, downloads Chromium on first start)
tracking.rule_domains: Restrict to domains (comma-separated, takes effect from V1.1)
tracking.presets_v2_hint: Want reusable schedule templates for the team? V2 via /tracking page. Wizard's schedule applies only to this rule.
tracking.domains_v1_1_hint: Domain filtering ships in V1.1 via the /tracking page.

im.intro_hint: Submit content and ask questions through IM channels (e.g. Telegram). Skip if you don't need it now — manage tokens under «Settings → Notifications / IM channels» anytime.

embedding.enable_description: Off by default. Enabling activates hybrid search (FTS5 + vector RRF fusion) for significantly better knowledge-query recall, but first start runs a backfill (time scales with stored fact count).
embedding.model_dropdown_placeholder: Select a model (depends on configured providers)
embedding.model_hint_pick_embedding: Providers come from the previous Model providers step. If you don't see a suitable embedding model (e.g. text-embedding-3-small / nomic-embed-text), go back, add the model id to that provider, and toggle the embedding switch on the right.
embedding.model_no_embedding_models: This provider has no embedding model — go back, add a model id, and toggle the embedding switch on the right.
embedding.first_time_no_backfill: First time: DB is empty, no backfill cost.

auth.dev_intro: Development deployment defaults to no password — all access is unauthenticated.
auth.prod_intro: Production deployment requires a password (≥ 8 characters).
auth.enable_sub: Once enabled, all web / API requests must carry a Bearer token. Recommended for production.
auth.submit_failed_body: Server unreachable. Check it is running and try again.
auth.validation_back_to_edit: Please go back to a previous step to edit

complete.metadata_seed_warning_body: Your runtime overrides were persisted successfully, but the digest / tracking presets could not be seeded into the DB. You can configure them manually from the dashboard after restart.
complete.auto_restart_body: Click the button below — we'll restart and take you to the dashboard automatically.
complete.auto_restart_unknown_hint: Supervisor not recognized — if the page doesn't recover after a restart, check the process manually.
complete.auto_restart_split_web_hint: Heads up: if your web container is separate (docker / k8s), restart it too — its auth/language env are read at process start.
complete.auto_restart_in_progress: Restarting — we'll redirect you once the server is ready…
complete.auto_restart_timeout: Restart timed out — check the supervisor status, then go to the dashboard manually.
complete.auto_restart_post_failed: Server rejected the restart request. Check server logs and try again.
complete.manual_restart_body: The current process can't be restarted from the web (concurrently shuts down server and web together). Please:
complete.manual_restart_step_terminal: Press Ctrl+C in your terminal to stop the current process
complete.manual_restart_one_click_hint: Want one-click web restart? Start with pnpm dev / pnpm start:supervised / docker — they bring their own supervisor and you'll see a restart button here instead.

onboarding.tz_card_sub_probe_failed: Couldn't auto-detect timezone. At {offset} your current time should be {time}

clarify_question.tracking_resolve_entity: Multiple entities found, please pick one

note_payload.save_failed_draft_preserved: Save failed; your edits are still here. Please retry.
note_payload.delete_confirm: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
note_payload.action_blocked_dirty: Save or discard your edits before archiving / deleting.
note_payload.navigation_blocked_dirty: Save or discard your edits before leaving this note.
note_payload.reclassify_hint: Archive the original note and reprocess with the selected intent.
note_payload.reclassify_blocked_dirty: Save or discard your edits before reclassifying.
note_payload.reclassify_rollback_failed: Reclassification failed and unarchive rollback also failed ({error}). The original note is archived; check the archived list to recover.
note_payload.promote_blocked_archived: Note is archived — unarchive to promote
note_payload.promote_confirm_message: Promoting this note creates a new source and runs the full pipeline. The original note is preserved and linked to the new source. Continue?
note_payload.promote_too_short: Add more context before promoting (minimum {min} characters).
note_payload.translate_blocked_archived: Archived notes cannot be translated — unarchive first
note_payload.translate_empty: Note content is empty — nothing to translate
note_payload.translate_already_target: Note is already in the target language.
note_payload.notification_denied_banner_only: Desktop notifications denied — reminders only show when Library tab is open.
